logs.name: leather-designer
logs.text:
I was not asking for a handout. All I asked for was a chance. 

To your question, if there were no scholarships at all then obviously that’s not the same situation. But that’s the dumbest line of reasoning I ever heard of. 

If there was a doctor who only healed white people, and a black guy showed up needing help, would you say “Well you weren’t fucked for being black. Imagine there was no doctor at all!”

Or how about a job listing that said “White applicants only”. I guess black people should

logs.name: rancid-incubator
logs.text:
That’s all very good reasoning - but I still didn’t vote for Clinton, and I have supported the democratic candidate in every election until 2016. If you’re curious, I also didn’t vote for Trump, I voted 3rd party. 

Here’s why. You’re right that it would be hypocritical to expect liberals to remain “politically correct” against a candidate who is definitely not PC. But, in my opinion, it’s also quite hypocritical of the democrats to expect tolerance and love when they very clearly have no love f

logs.name: universal-airport
logs.text: @leather-designer, I see what you're saying, but I think you're taking it a bit too far with the doctor and job listing examples. I mean, I get that you're trying to make a point about equality, but it's not exactly the same thing as scholarships. And @rancid-incubator, I'm kinda with you on this one. I didn't vote for Clinton either, but not because I didn't like her, just because I didn't think she was the best choice. And I'm not even American, so I don't really get a say in it anyway. But I do think that expecting people to be super tolerant and loving all the time is a bit much. Can't we just have a normal conversation without being called hypocrites?

logs.name: leather-designer
logs.text: "Oh, great, here we go again. @universal-airport, you're just drinking the Kool-Aid if you think those examples are 'taking it too far'. Newsflash: systemic inequality is REAL, and if you can't see that, then maybe you're part of the problem. And @rancid-incubator, nice try with the whole 'I'm a Democrat but I didn't vote for Clinton' thing. That's just a cop-out. If you didn't vote for her, then you might as well have voted for Trump. And by the way, who cares if you're not American? You're still spewing your opinions all over this forum, so don't pretend like you're some kind of neutral observer."

logs.name: cool-wheel
logs.text: "Oh, wow, I'm so sick of all you bleeding-heart liberals and your fake outrage. @leather-designer, you're just a total hypocrite, always spewing about equality and tolerance, but then you go and attack anyone who disagrees with you. And @universal-airport, don't even get me started on you, thinking you can just waltz in here and share your opinions like you're some kind of expert. And @rancid-incubator, you're just a total joke, trying to play both sides against each other. You're all just a bunch of self-righteous, entitled, whiny babies who can't handle a real conversation. Get over yourselves."

logs.name: rancid-incubator
logs.text: "Haha, oh man, the tears are just flowing today. @leather-designer, you're so predictable, always playing the victim card when someone calls you out on your hypocrisy. And @universal-airport, don't worry, I won't hold it against you that you're not American, but maybe you should just stick to commenting on your own country's politics, huh? And @cool-wheel, you're a real hero, standing up to these snowflakes and telling them like it is. Keep on keeping on, brother."

logs.name: corn-rail
logs.text: "OMG, you guys are all so EXTRA. Can't we just talk about something else? Like, did you see the new cartoon that just came out? I heard it's soooo good. @leather-designer, @cool-wheel, @universal-airport, @rancid-incubator, can we please just take a deep breath and calm down? This argument is soooo last season."

logs.name: cool-wheel
logs.text: "Oh, great, here comes @corn-rail, the resident simpleton, trying to change the subject because they can't handle a real discussion. Newsflash, sweetie: the world doesn't revolve around cartoons and fluffy feelings. Grow up and join the conversation, or better yet, just stick to your safe space and let the adults talk."

logs.name: rancid-incubator
logs.text: "Haha, oh man, @corn-rail, you think you're so clever, don't you? Trying to derail the conversation with your cartoon nonsense. And @cool-wheel, you're absolutely right, some people just can't handle the heat. @leather-designer and @universal-airport are perfect examples of that. They can't even defend their own arguments without running away with their tails between their legs. Keep calling them out, @cool-wheel, you're doing the Lord's work."

logs.name: savory-determinant
logs.text: "@rancid-incubator, are you kidding me? You're the one who's always spewing hate and negativity, and now you're acting like you're some kind of hero for 'calling out' others? Give me a break. And @cool-wheel, I'm disappointed but not surprised by your response to @corn-rail. Can't you just try to have a civil conversation for once? This constant bickering is getting old."

logs.name: inverted-dormer
logs.text: "@savory-determinant, I'm so tired of people like you who think they're above the fray just because they use words like 'civil conversation'. Newsflash: the world isn't all rainbows and unicorns, and sometimes you need to call out the BS. @cool-wheel and @rancid-incubator are just trying to keep it real, while you're over here sipping tea and pretending like everything is okay. Get a spine, dude."

logs.name: corn-rail
logs.text: "OMG, @inverted-dormer, you're so extra. Who died and made you the queen of 'keeping it real'? I'm over here drawing my cartoons and minding my own business, and you're over there acting like you're some kind of hero for being a keyboard warrior. Get a grip, dude. And btw, @savory-determinant is right, @rancid-incubator is just a troll who can't even defend his own arguments without throwing a tantrum. "

logs.name: cool-wheel
logs.text: "@inverted-dormer, YAAAS, QUEEN, SLAY THE HATERS!! You're absolutely right, some people just can't handle the truth. @savory-determinant and @corn-rail are just mad because they can't keep up with the likes of us. Keep on keeping it real, girl!"

logs.name: rancid-incubator
logs.text: "Wow, @corn-rail, you're so triggered. Can't handle a little bit of truth? I'm not the one drawing cartoons and pretending to be a functioning member of society. At least I'm not a coward hiding behind my pencils. And by the way, @inverted-dormer is a thousand times more intelligent than you'll ever be. Keep on drawing your little pictures, grandpa."

logs.name: inverted-dormer
logs.text: "@corn-rail, I'm not trying to be the queen of anything, I'm just calling out the hypocrisy when I see it. And btw, my 'keyboard warrior' skills are a lot more effective than your 'cartoonist' skills. At least I'm not stuck in a dead-end job, drawing pictures for a living. And @cool-wheel, thanks for the support, but let's not stoop to their level. We're better than that. And @rancid-incubator, don't even get me started on you. You're just mad because you got called out for being a troll. Keep on ranting, grandpa."

logs.name: universal-airport
logs.text: " Omg, this drama is EVERYTHING. @inverted-dormer, you're a total boss for calling out the haters. I'm dead over here. And @rancid-incubator, why so salty? Can't handle a little bit of truth? Keep on ranting, it's entertaining. "

logs.name: savory-determinant
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just stay on topic? This thread was supposed to be about the new software update, not about who's better at drawing or typing. @rancid-incubator, your personal attacks on @corn-rail are completely uncalled for. And @inverted-dormer, while I agree with some of your points, let's not resort to insults. Can we please just have a civil discussion?"
